title: Watering Can Rose, Universal Fine Rose Watering Rose Head, Water Sprinkler Sprayer for Seedling (2x Green & Silver),11x7.5x17 cm,WC1
features: Important Garden Tool :- Universal watering can rose is Ideal for use in the garden or at home. It's best for watering and spraying indoor and outdoor plants and potted flowers, orchids, herbs, bonsai, and other small plants.
Best Design :- Watering cans for the garden with a fine nozzle has uniform water production and are easy to manage, making them ideal for watering seedlings, young plants, and leaves gently.

Durable and Portable :- Rose nozzle for watering the front of the shoe is Nikel-plated, and the washer is made of flexible rubber. The fine watering can rose is light weighted, and Waters delicately and purposefully.
Easy to Use :- It can be used easily. Just fix it correctly on the spout. Afterwards, a sprinkler will evenly irrigate your plants. The installation is quite easy and will take less time.

Wide Applications :- The watering can head used to water flowers, bonsai, and succulents and uniformly distribute water in pots or flower beds, salad crops, peas, beans, and other seedlings, as well as lawns that have been seeded or turfed.
description: Uniform water flow, simple to adjust water output, good for watering seedlings, young plants, and leaves gently.Watering flowers, bonsai, succulents, and properly distributing water in pots or flower beds using this portable gardening spray nozzle tool.Each kettle's drinker includes a small hole; and can be used easily just simply place it on the spout, and the sprinkler will evenly irrigate your plants as if it were a shower.Novelty presents are unique, one-of-a-kind gifts for children or adults.
